title: Decadent Spicy Greek Lamb Pilaf
description: A peppery and molten Greek dish featuring green chilli and tadka, perfect for a Mediterranean-inspired meal prep dinner. This recipe combines the flavors of lamb, rice, and spices for a delicious and satisfying meal.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium-high heat.
Add the lamb pieces and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the diced onion and cook until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the diced green chilli and cook for 1 minute, until slightly softened.
Add the tomato paste and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the basmati rice and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly, until the rice is coated in the tomato paste mixture.
Add 2 cups of water to the saucepan and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover the saucepan with a tight-fitting lid, and simmer for 20 minutes, until the rice is cooked and the liquid has been absorbed.
Stir in the crumbly feta cheese and season with salt and black pepper to taste.
